World.title: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?

World.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship

World.desc: Fatalities have been reported around Ukraine as Kyiv says Russian "shadow fleet" tankers were hit by drones.

World.desc: Police suspect the human remains belong to a businessman swept away by floodwater last week.

World.title: The clandestine network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout

Technology.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards
Technology.desc: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

Technology.desc: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.

Technology.title: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
Technology.desc: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.

Technology.desc: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.

Technology.desc: The record results come as boss Tim Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm.

Science.title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work

Science.title: UK's biggest ever environmental pollution claim reaches High Court

Science.title: 'We're living in a shed because of river pollution'
